description: A vibrant Fauvist landscape depicting the coastal town of Saint-Tropez on the French Riviera. The composition shows an elevated vantage point overlooking clustered houses with red-orange rooftops, a prominent church bell tower, and the vivid blue waters of the Mediterranean stretching to distant purple-green hills. The brushwork is bold and expressionistic, with intense, non-naturalistic color applied in thick, dynamic strokes. Warm yellows and oranges dominate the foreground terrain, contrasting sharply with the deep blues and greens of the sea and sky.
